channel.title: Cli on What I Did All Week
channel.description: Recent content in Cli on What I Did All Week

item.title: WSL Basic Commands Cheatsheet
item.description: A practical reference guide for the most useful WSL (Windows Subsystem for Linux) commands — from installation to managing distributions and mounting disks.

item.title: yt-dlp: The YouTube Downloader Tutorial
item.description: Learn how to install and use yt-dlp, the powerful command-line tool for downloading videos and audio from YouTube
